svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="阶段2模块化+BFF" id="stage2"> <mxGraphModel dx="-524" dy="-152" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="980" pageHeight="600" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=15;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="阶段2：模块化 Vue + 轻量 BFF（Express）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="500" x="240" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="A" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="模块化 Vue 项目
（用户/订单/商品模块）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="220" x="80" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="B" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="Express 轻量 BFF 层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="400" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="C" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="Java + SpringBoot
微服务" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="200" x="720" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="D" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f0fdfa;strokeColor=#5eead4;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=12;" value="内部公共组件 / 工具库" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="220" x="80" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="Nginx 静态部署" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="220" x="80" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="F" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="Node.js 服务器" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="400" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="G" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="Java 容器集群" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="720" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="H" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f0fdfa;strokeColor=#5eead4;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="终端用户" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="120" y="450" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eAB" edge="1" parent="1" source="A" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="B" value="调用"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eBC" edge="1" parent="1" source="B" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="C" value="调用"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eAD" edge="1" parent="1" source="A" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#134e4a;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="D" value="复用"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eAE" edge="1" parent="1" source="A" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=0.25;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.25;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="E" value="构建"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="135" y="180" /> <mxPoint x="135" y="320" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eBF" edge="1" parent="1" source="B" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="F" value="部署"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eCG" edge="1" parent="1" source="C" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="G" value="部署"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eEH" edge="1" parent="1" source="E" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="H" value="用户访问"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eFC" edge="1" parent="1" source="F" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="C" value="接口转发"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="680" y="245" /> <mxPoint x="680" y="190" /> <mxPoint x="820" y="190" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eGB" edge="1" parent="1" source="G" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="B" value="接口响应"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="680" y="320" /> <mxPoint x="500" y="320" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
